items.name_en: LOтДоwтДоЁЯМЯSmall SizeЁЯЖХNappa Squeeze Handbag ЁЯСЬ A refined and soft new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crinkled body, an adjustable donut chain, and a soft-touch handle. This small size is crafted from Nappa sheep leather. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, plus an extra chain to extend the strap further *Magnetic closure* Internal zip pocket *Unlined* loewe hot stamping or silver stamping.

LOтДоwтДоЁЯМЯSmall SizeЁЯЖХNappa Squeeze Handbag ЁЯСЬ A refined and soft new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crinkled body, an adjustable donut chain, and a soft-touch handle. This small size is crafted from Nappa sheep leather. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, plus an extra chain to extend the strap further *Magnetic closure* Internal zip pocket *Unlined* loewe hot stamping or silver stamping.
size:29*10.5*24CM
Model:652329 hardware
